name: Experian Business Credit & Data API
what_it_does: Experian REST APIs for business credit intelligence, identity verification, fraud prevention, and data analytics. Enables AI agents to manage business credit report and Intelliscore Plus business credit score retrieval for commercial lending decisions, handle consumer credit data access (with FCRA-compliant permissible purpose) for consumer underwriting, access identity verification and fraud risk data via CrossCore platform for KYC and account opening, retrieve business firmographic data and company profile information for B2B data enrichment, handle device and email intelligence for digital fraud prevention, access income and employment verification via Employer Insights, retrieve marketing analytics and audience data for consumer targeting, manage healthcare insurance eligibility and patient financial risk data, handle automotive lending analytics and vehicle title data, and integrate Experian data with lending, insurance, banking, and marketing platforms.
use_cases: Underwriting small business loans from commercial credit agents
Verifying consumer identity from KYC fraud prevention agents
Enriching business records from firmographic data agents
Assessing income verification from lending decision agents
not_for: Non-permissible purpose credit access without FCRA compliance
Consumer self-service credit monitoring without institutional access
best_when: A lender, bank, insurance carrier, or enterprise using Experian wants AI agents to automate commercial credit decisioning, consumer identity verification, fraud risk scoring, income verification, and business data enrichment within FCRA and permissible purpose frameworks.
avoid_when: FCRA LEGAL RISK: Experian consumer credit data is FCRA-governed — automated adverse decisions (credit denial, employment, housing) require FCRA-compliant adverse action process and permissible purpose verification. Consumer credit pulls without permissible purpose are criminal violations. State-specific FCRA analogs (CA CCRAA, NY FAIR) impose additional obligations. Small business credit data blends commercial and consumer data; verify FCRA applicability for small business decisions.

auth.notes: Experian uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. Developer portal at developer.experian.com. Dublin, Ireland HQ (LSE: EXPN). One of the three major US credit bureaus. CrossCore is the fraud and identity platform. Experian Boost (consumer credit enhancement). Clarity Services (alternative data). No webhooks — synchronous inquiry model. Competes with TransUnion and Equifax for consumer credit; D&B and Equifax Commercial for business credit.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-inquiry pricing; annual contracts for volume; analytics and decisioning platforms separately
pricing.notes: Dublin, Ireland. Experian plc (LSE: EXPN). Founded 1996 (GUS plc spinoff). $6B+ annual revenue. One of the three major credit bureaus globally. CrossCore identity and fraud platform. Experian Boost, CreditLock for consumer services. Healthcare eligibility and patient risk analytics. Automotive lending analytics. Competes with TransUnion and Equifax for credit bureau market; FICO for analytics.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; contract and product dependent

known_agent_gotchas: FCRA CRIMINAL VIOLATION: Consumer credit data access without permissible purpose is a criminal violation; verify and document permissible purpose for every automated credit inquiry
Adverse action notice — FCRA Section 615 requires adverse action notice with specific credit bureau contact and dispute rights; automated decisions must trigger proper adverse action workflows
Small business FCRA ambiguity — small business credit files mix consumer and commercial data; FCRA applicability to small business decisions is complex; confirm with legal counsel
CrossCore decisioning complexity — Experian CrossCore orchestrates multiple identity and fraud signals; complex decisioning logic may require Experian professional services configuration
Employer Insights income verification — Experian Employer Insights uses payroll provider data; coverage may be incomplete for self-employed or gig workers; validate coverage for your customer base
Healthcare eligibility HIPAA — Experian healthcare insurance eligibility checks handle PHI; automated eligibility queries require HIPAA BAA and compliant data handling
agent_readiness.security_notes: Credit bureau and fraud prevention. SOC2, ISO27001, FCRA, GLBA, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU/UK/AU. Consumer credit and fraud data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Credit bureau. SOC2, FCRA, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Consumer credit and fraud data.
